
  # Professional Portfolio for Joseph Wambugu

  This is a code bundle for Professional Portfolio for Joseph Wambugu. The original project is available at https://www.figma.com/design/4X7JA0Y5kWlL0dyGY4oHuI/Professional-Portfolio-for-Joseph-Wambugu.

  ## Running the code

  Run `npm i` to install the dependencies.

  Run `npm run dev` to start the development server.
